function.message: Processed the oldest inbox item by running the requested eight finance records through the local OCR workflow: each listed invoice and bill now has schema-compliant YAML frontmatter extracted from the visible note text, with the original note body preserved. The processed inbox request was then removed.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree, root AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS when entering folders, used OCR workflow plus finance schema, preserved original note bodies, and deleted the inbox item only after successful completion per inbox-processing rules.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly asked to run eight listed finance notes through the OCR workflow. The workflow docs in 99_system/workflows/ocr-records.md and 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md define OCR here as extracting visible note data into YAML frontmatter while preserving the note body. Each of the eight listed finance files contained visible tabular fields and line items sufficient to populate the required invoice or bill schema exactly, so the requested updates were completed and the inbox item was removed per 99_system/workflows/process-next-inbox-item.md and 99_system/workflows/inbox-processing-v2-update.md.
completed_steps_laconic: wrote YAML frontmatter to 8 listed finance records
